name: Delica Foods Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Delica Foods Holdings Co., Ltd. wholesales vegetables in Japan. The company engages in the delivery of whole and cut vegetables. It serves family and fast food restaurants, convenience stores, etc. The company was formerly known as Delica Foods Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Delica Foods holdings Co.,Ltd. in October 2017. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
